title: A Bolt of Lightning
text:
## Chapter One

At Sāvatthī. “Possessions, honor, and popularity are grim … Let forked lightning fall on whom? Let possessions, honor, and popularity come to a trainee who has not achieved their heart’s desire.

‘Forked lightning’ is a term for possessions, honor, and popularity. So grim are possessions, honor, and popularity. …”
